title: The Gray Hand buys the mill
announce: Word crosses the market like a dropped coin: someone has bought the ruined old mill, sight unseen, for a song. Nobody knows who signed.
briefing: The buyer is the Gray Hand, through a proxy. They want the flooded undercroft — and they have already sent men to hold the place. (Testbed fixture for world events — droppable before a release.)

title: Market day
announce: Market day in Brightvale: the square doubles in stalls and noise, farm carts queue at the gate, and coin moves faster than gossip — which is saying something.
